task.goal: 完成所有开发任务，按照docs目录下的开发计划，继续开发直到全部完成

lastDecision.summary: All 20 features complete. M7 (real nano-pencil SDK integration) implemented: NanoPencilEngineAdapter rewrites with PencilAgent SDK, chat.ts uses instance.engine, engine bound to registry. M8 (short-term memory) verified with 14 tests. M9 (Docker) polished: Dockerfile, docker-compose, README self-host docs. Test suite: 93 tests across 8 files, all passing. Typecheck clean. Architectural gaps fixed: CORS middleware, path traversal protection.
lastDecision.nextStep: Manual verification steps remaining: 1) Provide real provider API key to test end-to-end chat, 2) Run Docker build locally to verify container image
